subject: Transitioning IT
body:
Rich,

 

I am assuming you are aware of my departure on Jan 4, 2008.  If not,
sorry to put it in an email.  Let's talk further.

 

January 14th, my replacement will be starting, Bill Murphy.  From now
till that date I'll be working with him closely to transition all that
is IT.  He will be coming in late evenings, etc. to discuss and tour
and...  After the 4th I will remain on full time salary for two months,
per JE, to consult with Bill on anything that I may.  After that time we
will discuss new arrangements should you still feel my services
necessary in a reduced capacity or at all.

 

FYI, my departure is not an easy decision albeit well thought out.  It
is always my hope to remain, while distant, close to the firm.  You've
all been great professionals and friends.

 

Thanks,

David

 

Davidlampert1@yahoo.com

858-204-1488
body_html:
Rich,

 

I am assuming you are aware of my departure on Jan 4, 2008.  If not, sorry to put it in an email.  Let’s talk further.

 

January 14th, my replacement will be starting, Bill Murphy.  From now till that date I’ll be working with him closely to transition all that is IT.  He will be coming in late evenings, etc. to discuss and tour and…  After the 4th I will remain on full time salary for two months, per JE, to consult with Bill on anything that I may.  After that time we will discuss new arrangements should you still feel my services necessary in a reduced capacity or at all.

 

FYI, my departure is not an easy decision albeit well thought out.  It is always my hope to remain, while distant, close to the firm.  You’ve all been great professionals and friends.

 

Thanks,

David

 

Davidlampert1@yahoo.com

858-204-1488
